title: Change cursor/blink color

requirements.text: Change the blinking cursor indicator color on the current character position in the typing test. Update the relevant CSS keyframe animation and/or the `.current` character highlight class in `frontend/src/index.css` so the blinking cursor uses a distinct, visually appealing color (e.g., a bright accent such as amber/yellow or white) instead of the current color.
acceptanceCriteria: The blinking cursor on the current character position uses a new, distinct color different from the previous one.
The blink animation still functions correctly (cursor visibly blinks/pulses).
The new color is consistent with the overall dark navy/cyan design theme.
No other character highlight states (correct/incorrect/pending) are affected.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx.
Do not alter the correct (green) or incorrect (red) character highlight colors.
nonGoals: Changing the overall color theme or gradient background.
